DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-05-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT AMERICAN HOME MORTGAGE SERVICING, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

APPEARANCES: Clifton Constantine & Crismarie Constantine, 707/648-7383 pltfs & opposing parties in propria persona; M. Elizabeth Holt, Esq. of Severson & Werson 677-5596 for deft & moving party American Home Mortgage Servicing, Inc.; Jessica H. Costanzo, Esq. of Alborg, Veiluva & Martin LLP 925/939-9880 for deft North American Title Co.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. NO SUBSTANTIVE OPPOSITION FILED. In addition, the Court stated that plaintiff is to file the amended complaint by 05/20/11. (Defendant to prepare a proposed form of order.) (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-17-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT NORTH AMERICAN TITLE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Appearances: Michael Rabb of Alborg Veiluva & Martin (925.939.9880) for defendant and moving party. No other appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: sustained with leave to amend as to all causes of action. Plaintiff to allege role of North American Title in transaction and fraud with specificity. Order signed in open court. (302/PHA) Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Court Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-14-2011 Continued To Apr-05-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT AMERICAN HOME MORTGAGE SERVICING, INC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: continued to April 5, 2011. Opposing party to provide a courtesy copy of opposition to department 302 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. See San Francisco Local Rule 2.6 B. (302/PHA) Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Court Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-07-2011 Continued To Mar-17-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT NORTH AMERICAN TITLE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO THE COMPLAINT OF CLIFTON CONSTATINE, JR. AND CRISMARIE CONSTATINE.

APPEARANCES: Clifton Constantine & Crismarie Constantine, 707/648-7383 pltf & opposing party in propria persona; Jessica Costanzo, Esq. of Alborg, Veiluva & Martin LLP 925/939-9880 for deft & moving party.

RULING: The Court vacated its tentative ruling and continued the matter to 03/17/11 at 9:30am. Moving party provided courtesy copies and plaintiffs filed an opposition today (03/07/11). Defendant's reply due 03/14/11. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Denise L. Doucette, CSR #5963
